Ntc Of Mo & Mo For Order Assigning Case To The Basf Voluntary Early Mediation Program
Off Calendar Jun-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Richard Boone Callaway, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff.
Plaintiff's Motion for Order assigning case to the Basf Voluntary Early Mediation Program is heard this day. Court ordered motion granted. Counsel has filed Stipulation and Declaration in support of motion. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause set on 9/16/2005 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court ordered a Jury Trial set on 12/12/2005 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. (212)
